SELECT toUInt32OrNull('0'), toUInt32OrNull('-1'), toUInt32OrNull('4294967295') FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table);
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_val FROM (SELECT toUInt32OrNull(value) FROM test_table) WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toUInt32OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE converted_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toUInt32OrNull(num) AS valid_numbers FROM numeric_test WHERE toUInt32OrNull(num) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toUInt32OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%a%') AS subquery;
SELECT CASE WHEN toUInt32OrNull(value) IS NULL THEN 'Conversion Failed' ELSE 'Conversion Successful' END AS conversion_status FROM test_table;
